title: We Clean. We Care. We Go Green.
subtitle: Clearing clutter the right way for a cleaner, greener tomorrow.

stages.title: We Revive
stages.description: Every job starts here — we collect junk, clutter, and unwanted items from your space with care and purpose.

stages.title: We Sort
stages.description: Nothing gets tossed blindly. Each item is carefully assessed and sorted to find its best possible next destination.

stages.title: We Donate, Recycle & Resell
stages.description: Usable items go to families in need, recyclables reach certified facilities, and valuables find deserving new owners.

stages.title: We Plant
stages.description: For every clean we complete, two trees are planted — our commitment to giving back to the planet we protect.
